/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/main.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o /tmp/build/bin/main  /tmp/build/_deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-graphics.a /tmp/build/_deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-window.a /usr/lib/libXrandr.so /usr/lib/libXcursor.so /usr/lib/libXrender.so /usr/lib/libXfixes.so /usr/lib/libXi.so /usr/lib/libXext.so /usr/lib/libX11.so /tmp/build/_deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-system.a -lrt /usr/lib/libGL.so /usr/lib/libudev.so -ldl /usr/lib/libfreetype.so /usr/lib/libharfbuzz.so
